title: taraxacum montanum var. denudatum
intro: Taraxacum montanum var. denudatum, also known as the naked dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Taraxacum montanum var. denudatum include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
